title: Why has Clavicular been arrested multiple times in 2026? A look at the past incidents
summary_full: Clavicular has been arrested twice in 2026. His February arrest in Arizona included serious charges but was later dropped due to lack of evidence, as confirmed by The New York Times journalist Joseph Bernstein. His second arrest in March in Florida involved a battery charge linked to a livestream incident. He has since been released, and the case is still recent.
